ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( ISNEW(), ISPICKVAL(Request_Type__c,'SI Support'), RecordType.DeveloperName = "Solution_Engineering", $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'SW Solutions' ), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Solution_Engineering", ISCHANGED(Request_Type__c), ISPICKVAL(Request_Type__c,'SI Support'), $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'SW Solutions' ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only SW Solutions can create a Solution Engineering request with the ‘SI Support’ type or change the Type to ‘SI Support’.
